title: Calendar View - Trello-style Todolist with Calendar Layout
description:
## Goal
Build a calendar page for the Focus Hub todolist app. Layout should be like a calendar (monthly grid) but task cards inside each day cell should be Trello-style (draggable cards with priority colors, completion toggles).

## Key Requirements
- Monthly calendar grid showing all days
- Task cards inside each day cell (like Trello cards in a column)
- Drag-and-drop tasks between days to reschedule
- Inline task creation from any day cell
- Week/Day view toggle
- Match existing dark theme design system
- Wire into existing routing and sidebar

## Technical Context
- React 19 + Vite + react-router-dom v7
- State: TodoContext with localStorage persistence
- Styling: Vanilla CSS with dark-mode CSS custom properties
- Date lib: date-fns
- Sidebar already has Calendar link (stub, no route)
